scripts.setup:elite: pnpm install && pnpm --filter @runbook/engine build && pnpm --filter @runbook/shadow-lab build && pnpm --filter @runbook/session build && pnpm --filter @runbook/mcp build
scripts.test:elite-journey: pnpm --filter @runbook/mcp exec vitest run src/golden-recursive-elite.test.ts src/golden-shadow-pilot.test.ts
scripts.smoke:web-shadow: pnpm --filter @runbook/engine build && pnpm --filter @runbook/shadow-lab build && pnpm --filter @runbook/web exec vitest run src/lib/shadow-lab-browser.test.ts src/components/shadow-lab.test.tsx
scripts.smoke:all-elite: pnpm smoke:elite && pnpm smoke:web-shadow && pnpm smoke:dossier
scripts.demo:elite: pnpm --filter @runbook/shadow-lab build && pnpm mcp:build && node scripts/recursive-elite-demo.mjs
scripts.demo:tournament: pnpm --filter @runbook/shadow-lab build && pnpm mcp:build && node packages/mcp/dist/cli.js shadow-tournament --generations 4 --mutants 4 --seed 7
